headline: Freedom Broker Initiates Coverage On EQT with Buy Rating, Announces Price Target of $79
summary: Freedom Broker  analyst Sergey Pigarev   initiates coverage on EQT (NYSE:EQT) with a Buy rating and announces Price Target of $79.
